docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO FEB-18-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-17-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-23-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HAND, PHILIP
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. PER FRONT DESK ATTENDANT (ROGER) PHILIP HAND IS AWAY FOR THE HOLIDAYS AND IT IS UNKNOWN UPON RETURN. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, JACK AS TO DEFENDANT HAND, PHILIP
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, JACK AS TO DEFENDANT HAND, PHILIP
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT HAND, PHILIP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2020 - THE ORDER REGARDING RESET OF HEARING IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-29-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL (SC-152) GRANTED. TRIAL CONTINUED TO FEB-26-21 AT 8:30 A.M. DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO APPEAR BY COURTCALL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-16-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 02/07/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-16-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JACK SCOTT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PHILIP HAND IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCES, COURTCALL. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT OF A PAYMENT OF $7196.25 TO BE PAID TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APR-16-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HAND, PHILIP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,081.25 FILED BY SCOTT, JACK AS TO DEFENDANT HAND, PHILIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HAND, PHILIP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2020 - CONTINUED PURSUANT TO ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL BY DEFENDANT TO FEB-26-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO APPEAR BY COURTCALL.
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT HAND, PHILIP

ORDER RE: RESET TO JUNE 16, 2020 AT 1:30 PM DEPT. 506 PER DEFENDANT ON FEBRUARY 10, 2020. PLAINTIFF JACK SCOTT IS PRESENT. DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR, THE CLERK DID NOT NOTICE THAT THIS MATTER HAD BEEN RESET. MATTER WAS HEARD AS UNCONTESTED AND JUDGMENT ISSUED. AFTER THE HEARING THE CLERK NOTICED THAT THE CURRENT HEARING DATE OF FEBRUARY 18, 2020 WAS PREVIOUSLY RESET AND THE MATTER WAS PUT BACK ON CALENDAR FOR JUNE 16, 2020. PLAINTIFF WAS NOTIFIED BY TELEPHONE OF THE NEW DATE.
(SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS): THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER: [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED. [X] MAIL MUST BE SENT TO PARTIES, NOT TO SAME THIRD PERSON NOT IN THE CASE.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, UPDATING COURT WITH HIS CURRENT MAILING ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, JACK
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HAND, PHILIP
DOCUMENTS RECEIVED FOR TELEPHONE APPEARANCE FILED BY DEFENDANT HAND, PHILIP
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
